title: Cobblemon Citrus & Berry
description: A Cobblemon centered modpack intended to be played in multiplayer. Features exploration, quality of life, and performance mods in addition to Cobblemon.
body:
Cobblemon Citrus & Berry is a Cobblemon centered modpack for 1.21.1. It is intended to be played in multiplayer with your friends. This mod pack features:

- Pokémon that you can collect, battle, and trade with other players
- NPCs to battle
- Structures to explore with powerful relics and other loot to collect
- The ability to make custom paintings and play music
- Several quality of life and performance mods to make your adventures go more smoothly
- New storage blocks and backpacks to make it easier to deal with inventory clutter
- Build the perfect team to compete against your friends or work together to face challenges together in Cobblemon Citrus & Berry!


Resource Packs/Data Packs Used:

- CobbleCats [cobblemon]
- E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons
- MissingMons [cobblemon]
- Soul Megas - FREE MEGAS FOR ALL

GraveStone Mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod)
